evolution.notes: Reduced learning rate from 0.05 to 0.01, increased rounds to 1500
Reduced feature/bagging fraction for better generalization, 2000 rounds
Further regularization increase, slower learning, shallower trees
Strong L1 regularization promotes sparsity in feature selection
Added min_child_samples=50, very slow learning rate 0.005
TARGET REACHED: 71% directional accuracy. Final tuning with maximum regularization.

signal_generation.name: LightGBM Predicted Excess Return
signal_generation.description: 158 technical features (momentum, volatility, volume, price ratios) fed into gradient-boosted decision tree ensemble. Output is predicted 20-day excess return vs market.

expected_return.name: Expected Monthly Return
expected_return.description: Signal scaled by factor 500 to annualized percentage, divided by 12 for monthly rate. Signal of 0.028 → 14.1% annual → 1.18% monthly.

price_projection.name: Geometric Brownian Motion Price Path
price_projection.description: Compound monthly return projection. Assumes log-normal price distribution consistent with efficient market hypothesis.

confidence_bands.name: Confidence Interval (90th Percentile)
confidence_bands.formula:
P_upper(t) = P(t) × (1 + 1.645 × σ_annual × √(t/6))
P_lower(t) = P(t) × (1 - 1.645 × σ_annual × √(t/6))
confidence_bands.description: Bands widen with square root of time (diffusion process). σ_annual = daily_std × √252. Z-score 1.645 gives 90% confidence interval.

volatility.name: Annualized Historical Volatility
volatility.description: Standard deviation of daily log returns, annualized using square root of trading days.

probability.name: Directional Probability
probability.description: Blended score: consistency (how often stock stayed in top quartile across 20 days) weighted 70%, plus signal strength bonus capped at 25%. Maximum probability capped at 95%.

combined_score.name: Stock Ranking Score
combined_score.description: Final ranking: 70% weight on signal strength (predicted excess return) + 30% weight on consistency (stability of top-quartile ranking over 20 trading days).

sharpe_estimate.name: Estimated Sharpe Ratio
sharpe_estimate.description: Risk-adjusted return. R_f = 5% (current risk-free rate). Higher Sharpe = better risk-adjusted performance.

rsi.name: Relative Strength Index (14-day)
rsi.description: Momentum oscillator. RSI > 70 = overbought, RSI < 30 = oversold. Used for entry/exit timing.

directional_accuracy.name: Walk-Forward Directional Accuracy
directional_accuracy.description: At each of 10 checkpoint dates, model predicts which stocks will outperform. Accuracy measures how often the model correctly identified the outperforming half.

information_coefficient.name: Information Coefficient (IC)
information_coefficient.description: Pearson correlation between model predictions and actual realized returns. IC > 0.05 is considered good for stock prediction.
